calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Jonathan H. Bornstein, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. Also present, Authorized Representative, Raymond Scarabosio. Defendant appearing in pro per. Case settled per the record. Matter taken off the settlement calendar and the trial date is vacated.
